---
title: "Lab 1: Introduction to QGIS"
subtitle: "Intro GIS for Public Health · QGIS track · Day 1"
---

::: {.lab-download}
[Download this lab (Word)](downloads/Lab01_Intro_QGIS_PH.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm download="Lab01_Intro_QGIS_PH.docx"}
[ArcGIS Online version](lab1-online.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[ArcGIS Pro version (Word)](downloads/Lab01_Intro_ArcGISPro_PH.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm download="Lab01_Intro_ArcGISPro_PH.docx"}
:::

{{< include _lab1-qgis.md >}}
